biotools.summary: The package implements an algorithm for fast gene set enrichment analysis. Using the fast algorithm allows to make more permutations and get more fine grained p-values, which allows to use accurate stantard approaches to multiple hypothesis correction.

bioschemas.name: fgsea

galaxy.summary: Perform gene set testing using fgsea
